title: Water test vessels
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Water test vessels demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to water test vessel

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Water testing procedures and information are accessed and interpreted1.3 Water testing options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Water testing procedures and information are accessed and interpreted1.3 Water testing options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Water testing procedures and information are accessed and interpreted1.3 Water testing options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to water test vessel

elements.title: Conduct safety inspection

pcs.text: Vessel safety equipment is audited2.2 Vessel systems and components are checked for seaworthiness, and compliance with manufacturer specifications and applicable state and territory regulations2.3 Vessel is checked for safety using testing equipment, as required2.4 Systems and components that fail the safety test are recorded, and supervisor and owner are notified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Vessel safety equipment is audited2.2 Vessel systems and components are checked for seaworthiness, and compliance with manufacturer specifications and applicable state and territory regulations2.3 Vessel is checked for safety using testing equipment, as required2.4 Systems and components that fail the safety test are recorded, and supervisor and owner are notified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Vessel safety equipment is audited2.2 Vessel systems and components are checked for seaworthiness, and compliance with manufacturer specifications and applicable state and territory regulations2.3 Vessel is checked for safety using testing equipment, as required2.4 Systems and components that fail the safety test are recorded, and supervisor and owner are notified.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct safety inspection

elements.title: Undertake water testing activities

pcs.text: Engine performance is tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and state and territory marine safety laws3.2 Propulsion unit is tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and state and territory marine safety laws3.3 Hull and hull fittings are tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and state and territory marine safety laws3.4 Vessel systems that fail water testing are reported according to workplace procedures, and include recommendations for required repairs or adjustments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Engine performance is tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and state and territory marine safety laws3.2 Propulsion unit is tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and state and territory marine safety laws3.3 Hull and hull fittings are tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and state and territory marine safety laws3.4 Vessel systems that fail water testing are reported according to workplace procedures, and include recommendations for required repairs or adjustments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Engine performance is tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and state and territory marine safety laws3.2 Propulsion unit is tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and state and territory marine safety laws3.3 Hull and hull fittings are tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and state and territory marine safety laws3.4 Vessel systems that fail water testing are reported according to workplace procedures, and include recommendations for required repairs or adjustments.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Undertake water testing activities

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vessel is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vessel is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
